title: Paper Cups,60PCS 9 OZ Party Disposable Cups Multicolor Paper Cup for DIY and Party Supplies (Assorted Colors)
features: 【Package Includes】：60 pieces party disposable cups in 6 color, 10 for each color, sufficient quantity for you to use. Bright color will making your party memorable and impressive, guests will love it very much.

【Size & Material】：9 ounce ( 7.5*5.3*9cm ) solid and durable drinking cups, made of highest grade and eco-friendly materials, biodegradable and environmentally friendly, safe for your party and normal use.

【Multicolor Cups】：These party cups are all designed in bright colours, suitable for DIY. Brilliant colors and functions, can create different patterns with them according your image, stimulate and cultivate children's imagination and creativity.

【Suitable for】: These party paper cups are ideal for restaurants, catering, holidays, and special event,perfect for cocktails, and all kinds of parties. Can meet the needs of normal party to enhance and brighten your party.

【Extensive use】：These paper cup can also be used for party drinkings cups or DIY with these cups, such as drawing some animals, flowers, trees, and other figures on them. Use your imagination to create works now with your kids!
description: Suloli Paper Cups, 60Pcs 9 Oz Party Disposable Cups Multicolor Paper Cup For Diy And Party Supplies Assorted Colors
